hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env"' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env\.' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.envrc'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not read or modify .env — it contains API keys. Use .env.example as reference.' && exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'requirements\.txt'; then echo 'BLOCK: requirements.txt is auto-generated by uv. Edit requirements.in instead, then run: uv pip compile requirements.in -o requirements.txt' && exit 1; fi
